response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and exposure to cloud platforms and MCP protocols, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct enterprise GenAI deployment — his AI experience is implied but not deeply documented.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Extensive full-stack proficiency with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud tooling (AWS CDK)
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production AI systems; most roles are general software engineering
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization metrics
Limited documentation of enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or legacy system integration

key_factors.factor: Lack of Proven GenAI Production Track Record
